reviews.review_description: Crazy Chicken VR Blast on the Quest 3 is so much FUN!!! The shooting feels super smooth, the environments are colorful and goofy, and those mischievous chickens keep you laughing while you’re trying to chase them down. It’s the perfect quick pick‑up‑and‑play game when you want something light, energetic, and satisfying. The improved clarity on the Quest 3 makes everything pop, and the gameplay loop is just pure, chaotic fun. Highly recommend if you want a cheerful VR experience!

reviews.review_title: One of the best single player shooter
reviews.review_description:
This is a hidden gem ! One of the best single player arcade first person shooter on the store !  7 maps , 6 guns (plus 3.4 bonus guns)  revolver , shotgun , bow , hunting rifle,  uzzi,  Sniper,  water gun , machine gun 

Quick and easy  tips for the devs to improve the experience 

1. Please add the option to change the color /skin of the guns , I will love to have a gold rifle or revolver or a camouflage one 

2. Please add the option to shoot the rifle/shotgun /heavy guns with 2 hands !!! Way more natural  , is very strange to shot this guns one handed,

reviews.review_title: Great arcade game with cool graphics
reviews.review_description: This goes out to the Developers. This is great arcade game with cool as graphics but it takes forever for the game to download for a player to start a game. Please fix this ASAP thanks in advance
I really like the game, a nostalgic experience for me, a real rail shooter at its best! Very FUN!!!  One more thing, a co-op mode would be good and more map

Absolute blast of a game and thanks for listening to the players
10/10 game
Fast paced highscore hunting. Love it!
